body:
## Rationale
10 'how-to-sound-like' guide pages exist at `/guides/how-to-sound-like-<drummer>` with rich step-by-step data in `soundLikeGuides.js`. Zero LLM markdown surface: `ls public/llms/` shows a `guides.md` hub but NO `/llms/guides/` directory. Pattern already proven for /llms/technique/<slug>.md (10 files, approved #1201, shipped) and /llms/licks/<slug>.md (63 files, shipped). AI assistants answering 'how do I sound like Lars Ulrich?' have no structured markdown to reference.

## Files to touch
- **Create** `public/llms/guides/` directory
- **Create** 10 files: `how-to-sound-like-joey-jordison.md`, `how-to-sound-like-lars-ulrich.md`, `how-to-sound-like-danny-carey.md`, `how-to-sound-like-tomas-haake.md`, `how-to-sound-like-dave-lombardo.md`, `how-to-sound-like-mario-duplantier.md`, `how-to-sound-like-gene-hoglan.md`, `how-to-sound-like-brann-dailor.md`, `how-to-sound-like-matt-halpern.md`, `how-to-sound-like-chris-adler.md`
- **Update** `public/llms/guides.md` hub to list the 10 per-guide files
- **Update** `public/llms/index.md` to include /llms/guides/ in the content map
- **Update** `api/sitemap.js` to include /llms/guides/*.md URLs

## Template (per file)
```markdown
# How to Sound Like {Name} — {Band} Drum Sound Guide

**Drummer:** {Name}  
**Band:** {Band}  
**Genre:** {Genre}  
**Guide URL:** https://metalforge.io/guides/how-to-sound-like-{slug}

## Overview
{drummer.name} of {band} is known for their {descriptor} playing style...

## Kit Setup
{gear from soundLikeGuides.js steps}

## Tuning & Setup
{tuning details}

## Technique Tips
{technique steps}

## Gear Shopping List
{gear items with links to /gear/<item>}

## FAQ
**Q: What drums does {name} use?**  
A: {answer}

**Q: How do I get the {name} drum sound?**  
A: {answer}
```

## Data source
`packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js` — 10 guide slugs, each with steps, gear specs, and tuning data.

## Page count
10 files

## Quality gate
- ≥200 words per file
- ≥2 FAQ Q&As per file
- Link to /guides/how-to-sound-like-{slug} live page
- Listed in /llms/guides.md and /llms/index.md

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves 'how to sound like X drummer' AI queries (ChatGPT/Perplexity). These are distinct from gear queries — instructional intent. Mirrors how /llms/technique/ files serve technique queries.

## Verify
1. `ls public/llms/guides/` shows 10 .md files
2. Each file has correct content from soundLikeGuides.js data
3. /llms/guides.md links to all 10 files
4. /llms/index.md lists guides/ section
5. sitemap.js includes /llms/guides/*.md URLs

## Done
PR merged creating public/llms/guides/ with 10 markdown files.
title: SEO batch: /llms/guides/<slug>.md — 10 soundLike guide pages with zero LLM markdown surface
